race.comment: Sticking with ZUPPA INGLESE (6) who got the job done as a short priced favourite at Echuca under the 62kg, proving too strong late to get up by half a length. She showed some good ability last time in and should make great strides second up. DUBAI DANCER (2) was just fair first up at Warrnambool but that was a much stronger race. She comes back a fair way in grade now and typically handles wet ground so expect a much better run. THE NARRATOR (3) has come back well, winning fresh before a solid effort as favourite last time. Can bounce back. EIRE OF FORTUNE (12) is third-up after a couple of moderate runs this campaign. Finished sixth over 1100m at Stawell last time out. Improver.
